substrate: combicone_substrate.npz (Norman combinatorial CRISPRa; file label A549 / canonical K562)
triage_score: training-free -cos: score = -mean pairwise cosine between single-gene effect vectors (combicone.triage_combinations, order=2, pairwise='mean')

random.rule: uniform random unmeasured pairs, numpy default_rng(seed=20260721), excluding the 30 triaged

retrospective_anchor.source: results/findings.json prospective_triage; reproduced this session (raw: 12 hits, 2.382x)

prospective_endpoint: hit = two-bar certified emergent (bar a: noise-injection p<0.05 AND bar b: floor_ratio>=1.9) via combicone.certify_emergence on the realized measured effect; a raw-residual-threshold endpoint is pre-registered as secondary (see protocol).
primary_test: one-sided two-proportion (triaged hit rate > random hit rate), alpha=0.05
freeze_note: This list and seed are frozen BEFORE any prospective measurement. Do not re-rank after data collection.
